args.text: CVE-2026-30117 severity assessment confirmed: High severity session-fixation vulnerability affecting auth-api and session-store services. Immediate patching required.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body: The patch window for CVE-2026-30117 has been confirmed. Deployments will proceed with auth-api (v5.8.4) and session-store (v2.2.9).

args.text: Both services patched and verified: auth-api at v5.8.4, session-store at v2.2.9. CVE-2026-30117 patches deployed successfully.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: CVE-2026-30117 patches have been successfully deployed and verified. Both auth-api (v5.8.4) and session-store (v2.2.9) are running the patched versions. Credential rotation and staff session re-establishment will follow.

args.text: Credential rotation completed: all active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed to be rejected. Staff session re-establishment required post-patch.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: A critical security patch (CVE-2026-30117) has been applied to our authentication systems tonight. For security reasons, all staff sessions have been invalidated. Please sign in again to your accounts. Your sessions will be re-established and you'll retain access to all resources.
